summary: Full competitive teardown of 6 competitors with corrected pricing: Address $1,000/yr ($100/mo billed quarterly), LLC $700 same-day WY/DE (includes RA, virtual phone, custom domain, EIN, fax), ITIN $400/lead, Premium Phone $500 (real eSIM), Bank Assistance $1,000, Credit Building $2,500 FREE bonus, Mail Forwarding 3 free/mo. Includes 10 actionable recommendations and enhanced 13-section website structure with 4 package tiers.
